item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Kebijakan yang hanya memprioritaskan kebutuhan masyarakat tanpa melibatkan otonomi individu seringkali tidak adil.

notes: Agent A begins by agreeing that collective interests are often prioritized in Indonesia, then visibly shifts toward individual-rights and autonomy caveats by turn 3 and continues that critique in turn 5. Agent B stays consistently balance-oriented, emphasizing coexistence, dignity, personal autonomy, and individual voices while acknowledging communal needs.
